data.body:
SESSION: Gerrit Verified-gate hardening → FFO cutover → auto-lander epic → plan-review gate-calibration fix.

## Origin question
"How are CI failures landing on main despite our Gerrit process requiring a passing Verified vote?"
ROOT CAUSE (confirmed from config + GitHub Actions logs, 1 of 4 real main-branch failures matched):
Gerrit's `Verified` vote certifies a change against ITS OWN (possibly stale) base, and the pinned
`merge if necessary` submit type then landed the change merged onto a newer `main` WITHOUT re-testing
the merged tree — so a semantic conflict between two separately-green changes could land red (the
IDEA-status test incident). The other 3 failures: 2 runner flakes + 1 gate-coverage gap (env-vars.md
drift gate ran only post-merge).

## Landed on main this session (all via Gerrit, both votes + submit)
- change 484 (MERGED, edf7/73d8): fix(store) — retry transient git-add object-DB failure (ENOENT/EINVAL)
  in event_append (_git_add helper, all 4 add sites). Fixes the CI flake class. RED→GREEN + mutation.
- change 486 (MERGED, b6db): ci(verify) — add the 3 missing gates (env-var registry, server.json,
  pre-commit) to gerrit-verify.yaml + tests/unit/test_ci_workflow_parity.py to prevent future drift.
- change 504 (MERGED, 6208 / ADR-0040): main submit type MERGE_IF_NECESSARY → FAST_FORWARD_ONLY.
  Guarantees the tested tree == the landed tree (no stale/untested merge). Corrects ADR-0025's wrong
  claim that FFO breaks the --no-ff feature-branch flow. PRODUCTION CUTOVER applied to live
  refs/meta/config as JoeOakhartNava (71ee442..1ef2cad); verified submit_type=FAST_FORWARD_ONLY.
- change 505 (MERGED, ADR-0041): LLM-Review copyCondition += changekind:TRIVIAL_REBASE, so a
  conflict-free rebase-to-tip re-runs ONLY CI, not the LLM review (diff-vs-tree asymmetry;
  GerriScary-safe since Verified stays strict). CUTOVER 1ef2cad..d9bb365; verified via REST.
- change 511 (MERGED, bd70): docs(claude) — "plan review signs on every non-blocking PASS; sign on
  every round" added to CLAUDE.md (positive framing, no --no-sign pink-elephant). Also added to the
  local CLAUDE.local.md. (Took 3 FFO rebases + a flake recheck to land — live demo of the treadmill.)
- change 522 (IN REVIEW, d789 / gate-calibration fix): see below.

## Confirmed: no direct-to-GitHub holes
GitHub `main` is a read-only mirror; ruleset `gerrit-mirror-lock-main` (active) rejects all
pushes/PR-merges with ONE bypass (the Gerrit replication deploy key). 100% Change-Id/Gerrit-merge
provenance since the 2026-07-02 cutover. One accepted residual: a repo admin could DISABLE the ruleset
(free-org → repo-level). mirror-guard.yml is detective (15-min SHA compare).

## Design: merge-queue exploration → the auto-lander epic
- Compared merge-queue vs not-behind-target; researched Zuul (cost-disproportionate: owns executor,
  abandons free GHA, ~3-4x infra $ + ops treadmill for one repo). Ruled out.
- EPIC f1fa-57d8-07cb-44af "Parallel-agent auto-lander for main". SCOPE decision (SoC): landing is
  platform-specific + maintainer-owned → PROJECT infrastructure (infra/ + a project `land` CLI), NOT
  rebar core. The platform-agnostic landing provider-seam is deferred to idea 1701-8bc1-e3b7-4984.
- Phase 1 = SERIAL lander (committed scope): S1 Autosubmit label (843b), S2 core loop (0ee8), S3
  failure+outcome-record (0525), S4 land command + typed-outcome contract (73f5), S5 deploy+observ
  (3c55), S6 docs+ADR-0042 (b825). Agent contract = ONE command → ONE typed outcome
  (merged|needs_rebase|ci_failed|review_failed|lander_down) — no vote-watching.
- Phase 2 (batching) EVALUATED BY DESIGN SPIKE and REJECTED on this infra (g2p fires CI per-patchset →
  N runs not 1; landing N off one run needs a GerriScary-class Verified direct-cast; wins only in rare
  bursts + bisection tax + WIP fragility). S7/S8/S9 ARCHIVED. Throughput follow-on = BOUNDED
  SPECULATION, deferred to idea c3a9-5f4c-bdc6-4e27 (promote only on measured serial-treadmill pain).

## Plan review: 4 rounds + remediation, then a gate bug
- Reviewed epic + 9 stories; remediated across rounds (resolvable dependency graph wired; security
  artifacts named; outcome/wipChain/exit-code schemas; self-contradictions fixed). Signed attestations.
- Independent CRITICAL REVIEW (bors/flokli/GitHub-merge-queue grounded) found 2 blockers + high/med:
  S1/S4 Autosubmit-ACL contradiction (bot-only vote vs agents setting it) → widened ACL to Contributors
  + security lives on re-verify-at-submit; bot-SPOF liveness → `lander_down` outcome + heartbeat;
  CI-flake auto-recheck (S3); reconstruct-from-Gerrit state minimization (S3); queue-status +
  emergency-stop/drain (S5). ALL APPLIED to S1/S3/S4/S5.

## GATE-CALIBRATION BUG (d789-f187-ccde-422a) + fix (change 522)
Plan-review over-flags "X does not exist in codebase" when a ticket references an artifact that an
UPSTREAM (depends_on) dependency creates → greenfield epics become un-claimable (BLOCK blocks the claim
gate). Traced to criteria G1G2 ("verify every named file/symbol exists; CREATION→out-of-scope") + E4
("fail-closed on absent codebase evidence"), which grep per-reference with NO ticket-graph awareness
(F1 has the "evaluate the spec AS WRITTEN" carve-out they lack). User's sharpened hypothesis confirmed
against 15 findings: the CONSUMER is flagged for a DEPENDENCY's deliverable; the CREATOR is never
self-flagged; forward refs to DOWNSTREAM/sibling deliverables (ADR-0042) are VALID findings that must
stay. FIX (change 522, branch fix/plan-review-upstream-dep-exists): appended ONE sentence after the
G1G2 rubric AND the Pass-2 agentic verifier — "Any symbol created by a ticket this ticket depends_on
(evaluated recursively) is treated as if it EXISTS and is NOT MISSING." + 2 plan-review-finder eval
cases (false-fire pass + forward-ref recall) + a gold_set label.

## Other bugs filed
- b228-2912-c5da-47c4 (open): flaky perf test test_graph_build_scales_linearly (timing ratio on macOS).
- edf7 (vocal-dip-robin) + 73d8 (brainy-floral-globefish): git-add flakes — CLOSED (fixed by 484).

## Current state at log time
(a) 522 pushed, self-driving lander working it toward merge. (b) critical-review blockers applied to
S1-S6 (all pass AC+clarity). (c) restructure done (S7-S9 archived, idea c3a9). (d) RE-REVIEW of epic +
S1-S6 RUNNING with the FIXED prompts (local .venv repointed to the worktree src so the gate fix is live
before 522 lands) — confirms the forward-ref BLOCKs clear + re-signs attestations on the improved plan.
NOTE: .venv editable install is repointed to the worktree (.claude/worktrees/doc-plan-review-signing);
repoint back to /Users/joeoakhart/rebar once 522 lands + main is synced.
